text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computer systems to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. These tasks include learning, reasoning, and problem-solving. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data instead of being explicitly programmed. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses layers of artificial neural networks to process complex information like images or speech. Today, AI is part of our daily life in many ways. For example, it powers voice assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps doctors analyse medical images. As AI develops, it continues to change how we live and work.
